tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: The members of the Metro-North Railroad ("Metro-North") Committee met jointly with the members of the Long Island Rail Road ("LIRR") Committee.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Representing Metro-North Railroad: Justin Vonashek – Senior Vice President, Operations Shelley Prettyman – Vice President, System Safety Michael Loney - Vice President, Maintenance of Way

tool_args.label: MTA Police Department
tool_args.raw_text: Representing MTA Police Department: Alexander Lindsay – Assistant Chief, Internal Affairs Bureau

tool_args.label: MTA Construction and Development
tool_args.raw_text: Representing MTA Construction and Development: Anthony Tufano – Senior Vice President, Railroads Business Unit

tool_args.label: LIRR 2023 ridership over 65 million
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR transported over 65,000,000 customers last year equating to a 24.4% ridership increase over 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: over 65,000,000 customers

tool_args.label: LIRR December 2023 ridership 34.8% increase vs Dec 2022
tool_args.raw_text: ridership increased by over 34.8% as compared to December of 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: over 34.8% as compared to December of 2022

tool_args.label: LIRR train service increased 41% in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: train service increased by 41% last year. In real terms, it means that LIRR operated over 302,000 trains in 2023, which is over 77,000 more trains than 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: increased by 41%

tool_args.label: LIRR operated over 302,000 trains in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR operated over 302,000 trains in 2023, which is over 77,000 more trains than 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: over 302,000 trains in 2023

tool_args.label: LIRR 2023 on-time performance 93.95%
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR accomplished on-time performance of 93.95% for the year, only five one-hundredths of a percentage below the goal of 94%.

payload.raw_value_text: 93.95% on-time performance for the year

tool_args.label: LIRR increased peak service by 56%
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR increased peak service by 56%, which amounts to about 151 trains a day alone.

payload.raw_value_text: increased peak service by 56%

tool_args.label: LIRR over 77,000 more trains in 2023 vs 2022
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR operated over 302,000 trains in 2023, which is over 77,000 more trains than 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: over 77,000 more trains than 2022

tool_args.label: LIRR achieved 60/40 Penn/GCM split during AM peak Jan 18 2024
tool_args.raw_text: for the very first time, on January 18, 2024, LIRR reached a 60/40 split between Penn Station and Grand Central Madison during the AM peak hour.

payload.raw_value_text: 60/40 split between Penn Station and Grand Central Madison during the AM peak hour

tool_args.label: Metro-North service delivery rate December 2023: 99.9%
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North service delivery rate for December 2023 was 99.9% with 99.7% for the year.

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2023 on-time performance 97.4%
tool_args.raw_text: Total 2023 OTP came in at 97.4%, marking the 4th consecutive year Metro-North has exceeded the 97% OTP mark.

payload.raw_value_text: Total 2023 OTP came in at 97.4%

tool_args.label: Metro-North December 2023 OTP 97.8%
tool_args.raw_text: System-wide on time performance for December was 97.8% above our goal of 94%.

payload.raw_value_text: System-wide on time performance for December was 97.8% above our goal of 94%

tool_args.label: Metro-North MDBF Nov 2023 over 263,000 miles
tool_args.raw_text: The mean distance between failures for the fleet was over 263,000 miles in November, above the goal of 175,000 miles.

payload.raw_value_text: over 263,000 miles in November, above the goal of 175,000 miles

tool_args.label: Metro-North YTD MDBF 328,000 miles
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date MDBF remains above goal at 328,000.

payload.raw_value_text: year-to-date MDBF remains above goal at 328,000

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2023 total ridership 60.1 million
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's total 2023 ridership east and west of the Hudson was 60.1 million, which is 23.4% higher than 2022's total and roughly 69% of the total for 2019.

payload.raw_value_text: total 2023 ridership east and west of the Hudson was 60.1 million

tool_args.label: Metro-North ridership 23.4% increase 2023 vs 2022
tool_args.raw_text: 23.4% higher than 2022's total

payload.raw_value_text: 23.4% higher than 2022's total

tool_args.label: Metro-North December 2023 ridership 5.4 million
tool_args.raw_text: December's ridership was 5.4 million

payload.raw_value_text: December's ridership was 5.4 million

tool_args.label: Metro-North weekend record 149,000 Dec 15, 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Weekend ridership was also robust with a new one-day record of 149,000 set on Saturday, December 15.

payload.raw_value_text: new one-day record of 149,000 set on Saturday, December 15

tool_args.label: Metro-North fare collection revenue losses down 35% to $13.9 million
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's fare collection rate outperformed its 4% goal and the total revenue losses were down 35% from 21.4 million to 13.9 million.

payload.raw_value_text: total revenue losses were down 35% from 21.4 million to 13.9 million

tool_args.label: LIRR December 2023 OTP 94.6%
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR's OTP for December was 94.6%, above the goal of 94%.

payload.raw_value_text: LIRR's OTP for December was 94.6%, above the goal of 94%

tool_args.label: LIRR MDBF November 2023: 143,264 miles
tool_args.raw_text: MDBF for the month of November was 143,264 miles below the goal of 170,000 miles.

payload.raw_value_text: MDBF for the month of November was 143,264 miles below the goal of 170,000 miles

tool_args.label: LIRR YTD MDBF as of November 2023: 170,227 miles
tool_args.raw_text: YTD MDBF as of November was 170,227 miles above the goal of 170,000 miles.

payload.raw_value_text: YTD MDBF as of November was 170,227 miles above the goal of 170,000 miles

tool_args.label: LIRR service delivery December 2023: 99.4%
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR completed 99.4% of its trips for the month of December and for the year 2023, the total was 99.6%.

payload.raw_value_text: LIRR completed 99.4% of its trips for the month of December

tool_args.label: LIRR 18 incidents with 10+ late trains in December 2023
tool_args.raw_text: There were 18 incidents which resulted in 10 or more late trains in the month of December.

payload.raw_value_text: 18 incidents which resulted in 10 or more late trains in the month of December

tool_args.label: LIRR customer injury rate 2.57 per million customers
tool_args.raw_text: The reportable customer injury rate increased from 2.43 to 2.57 per one million customers in the current 12-month reporting period (ending in November 2023) compared to the prior 12 months.

payload.raw_value_text: The reportable customer injury rate increased from 2.43 to 2.57 per one million customers in the current 12-month reporting period (ending in November 2023)

tool_args.label: LIRR employee lost time injury rate 4.4 per 200K hours
tool_args.raw_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate was increased from 4.27 to 4.4 per 200,000 working hours, compared to the prior 12 months.

payload.raw_value_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate was increased from 4.27 to 4.4 per 200,000 working hours, compared to the prior 12 months

tool_args.label: Metro-North customer injury rate 1.97 per million customers
tool_args.raw_text: The customer employee injury rate for the 12-month reporting period ending November 2023 compared to the prior twelve months ending November 2022 decreased from 2.42 to 1.97 per one million customers.

payload.raw_value_text: The customer employee injury rate... decreased from 2.42 to 1.97 per one million customers

tool_args.label: Metro-North employee lost time injury rate 1.97 per 200K hours
tool_args.raw_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate decreased from 2.16 to 1.97 per 200,000 hours worked compared to the prior twelve months.

payload.raw_value_text: The reportable employee lost time injury rate decreased from 2.16 to 1.97 per 200,000 hours worked compared to the prior twelve months

tool_args.label: Metro-North 300+ environmental inspections in 2023
tool_args.raw_text: The Office of System Safety's Environmental Compliance and Services team performed over 300 environmental field inspections and audits across Metro-North's territory last year.

payload.raw_value_text: performed over 300 environmental field inspections and audits across Metro-North's territory last year

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison one-year anniversary celebration
tool_args.raw_text: on January 23, 2024, he joined MTA Chair and CEO Janno Lieber and Metro-North President and former Interim LIRR President Catherine Rinaldi to greet customers at Grand Central Madison in celebration of the one-year anniversary of its opening day.

payload.description: MTA Chair and CEO Janno Lieber, Metro-North President Catherine Rinaldi, and LIRR Acting President Rob Free greeted customers at Grand Central Madison in celebration of the one-year anniversary of its opening day

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison shuttle service commenced
tool_args.raw_text: service to Grand Central Madison commenced on January 25, 2023 with shuttle service followed by full service on February 27, 2023.

payload.description: Service to Grand Central Madison commenced with shuttle service

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison full service commenced
tool_args.raw_text: full service on February 27, 2023.

payload.description: Full service to Grand Central Madison commenced

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal switch replacement program
tool_args.raw_text: on January 12, 2024, Metro-North began a replacement program in Grand Central Terminal focused on three critical double-slip switches and a diamond switch that allows trains to operate from any track in the Park Avenue tunnel to any platform in Grand Central Terminal. These switches have been in service since 2000 and are in need of replacement. Crews will work through late March.

payload.description: Metro-North began a replacement program in Grand Central Terminal focused on three critical double-slip switches and a diamond switch that allows trains to operate from any track in the Park Avenue tunnel to any platform in Grand Central Terminal. Crews will work through late March.

tool_args.label: Scarsdale Station accessibility ribbon cutting
tool_args.raw_text: The ribbon was cut earlier this month on the two latest success stories, both of which benefited the Harlem Line. Both Scarsdale and Hartsdale Stations have been made fully accessible with Scarsdale receiving a second elevator serving the Grand Central bound platform and Hartsdale getting two new lifts.

payload.description: Scarsdale Station made fully accessible with a second elevator serving the Grand Central bound platform

tool_args.label: Hartsdale Station accessibility ribbon cutting
tool_args.raw_text: Both Scarsdale and Hartsdale Stations have been made fully accessible with Scarsdale receiving a second elevator serving the Grand Central bound platform and Hartsdale getting two new lifts, one for each platform serving street, platform, and overpass levels.

payload.description: Hartsdale Station made fully accessible with two new lifts, one for each platform serving street, platform, and overpass levels

tool_args.label: MTAPD: 30 major felonies Dec 2023 across both railroads
tool_args.raw_text: for the month of December, there were thirty major felonies across both railroads.

payload.raw_value_text: thirty major felonies across both railroads

tool_args.label: MTAPD: 96 LIRR fare evasion summonses
tool_args.raw_text: on the LIRR system, the MTAPD issued 96 criminal summonses for fare evasion and on Metro-North, 21 summonses were issued for fare evasion.

payload.raw_value_text: on the LIRR system, the MTAPD issued 96 criminal summonses for fare evasion

tool_args.label: MTAPD: 21 Metro-North fare evasion summonses
tool_args.raw_text: on Metro-North, 21 summonses were issued for fare evasion.

payload.raw_value_text: on Metro-North, 21 summonses were issued for fare evasion

tool_args.label: LIRR fall 2023 customer satisfaction 70%
tool_args.raw_text: For LIRR, there was an overall increase in customer satisfaction from spring to fall at 70% overall satisfaction in the fall, up from 68% in the spring.

payload.raw_value_text: 70% overall satisfaction in the fall, up from 68% in the spring

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison customer satisfaction 97%
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison has an overall high score of 97%.

payload.raw_value_text: Grand Central Madison has an overall high score of 97%

tool_args.label: Metro-North fall 2023 customer satisfaction 86%
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North maintains a very high overall level of satisfaction at 86%

payload.raw_value_text: Metro-North maintains a very high overall level of satisfaction at 86%

tool_args.label: LIRR signal incident Dec 30 2023 caused 58 delays
tool_args.raw_text: The most significant event occurred on December 30, 2023, when there was a loss of the signal supervisory system at Penn Station Central Control caused by an Amtrak network communication issue. This incident caused 58 delays and reduced our monthly OTP by 0.2%.

payload.raw_value_text: loss of the signal supervisory system at Penn Station Central Control caused by an Amtrak network communication issue. This incident caused 58 delays and reduced our monthly OTP by 0.2%

tool_args.label: Customer survey: over 108,000 respondents
tool_args.raw_text: the response came from over 108,000 people for both railroads and transit, which is an extremely large sample.

payload.raw_value_text: response came from over 108,000 people for both railroads and transit

tool_args.label: MTA delegation trip to Munich and Zurich
tool_args.raw_text: last week, he along with several other representatives from the operations maintenance teams at New York City Transit, Metro-North, and the LIRR traveled to Munich, Germany and Zurich, Switzerland to seek and identify ways to innovate, reduce operating costs and improve efficiencies from our international peers.

payload.description: Senior Vice President Vonashek along with representatives from operations maintenance teams at NYCT, Metro-North, and LIRR traveled to Munich, Germany and Zurich, Switzerland to seek and identify ways to innovate, reduce operating costs and improve efficiencies from international peers

tool_args.label: LIRR Far Rockaway Branch weekend diversions February 2024
tool_args.raw_text: there are four weekends in February where state of good repair will be performed on switches. During that work, Far Rockaway Branch trains will be diverted to Grand Central Madison for each of those weekends for approximately 48 hours.

payload.description: state of good repair performed on switches; Far Rockaway Branch trains will be diverted to Grand Central Madison for each of those weekends for approximately 48 hours

tool_args.label: Metro-North removed 91 obsolete oil fill transformers
tool_args.raw_text: one key project was a partnership with the Power Department to remove 91 obsolete oil fill transformers throughout the territory.

payload.raw_value_text: remove 91 obsolete oil fill transformers throughout the territory

tool_args.label: Key drivers for customer satisfaction on both railroads
tool_args.raw_text: Chief of Strategic Initiatives Kaufman said both railroads have similar key drivers for customer satisfaction, such as "service reliability," "on time performance," and "peak service frequency." Dissatisfied customers for both railroads requested "shorter wait times on weekdays," "more reliable service," and "better fare incentives."

payload.claim_text: Both railroads have similar key drivers for customer satisfaction, such as 'service reliability,' 'on time performance,' and 'peak service frequency.' Dissatisfied customers for both railroads requested 'shorter wait times on weekdays,' 'more reliable service,' and 'better fare incentives.'
payload.subject: LIRR and Metro-North customers
payload.description: Fall 2023 Customers Count Survey key drivers for satisfaction

tool_args.label: LIRR ridership increase attributed to Grand Central Madison and service increase
tool_args.raw_text: the increased numbers were due in large part to the significant increase in service and the opening of Grand Central Madison.

payload.claim_text: the increased numbers were due in large part to the significant increase in service and the opening of Grand Central Madison
payload.subject: LIRR
payload.description: President Free attributed 2023 ridership growth to service increases and Grand Central Madison opening

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR joint task force on fare evasion
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North and LIRR are teaming up to combat fare evasion in accordance with the recommendations of the MTA's Blue-Ribbon Panel.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North and LIRR are teaming up to combat fare evasion in accordance with the recommendations of the MTA's Blue-Ribbon Panel
payload.subject: Metro-North and LIRR
payload.description: Joint task force formed to combat fare evasion

tool_args.raw_text: In the major crime categories, there were three robberies, eleven assaults, and thirteen grand larcenies.

payload.raw_value_text: three robberies, eleven assaults, and thirteen grand larcenies

tool_args.label: Metro-North and LIRR collaborate on fare evasion task force
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North and LIRR are teaming up to combat fare evasion in accordance with the recommendations of the MTA's Blue-Ribbon Panel.

tool_args.label: LIRR and MTAPD collaborate on fare evasion pilots
tool_args.raw_text: Both programs were supported by MTAPD and were very successful.

tool_args.label: Metro-North collaborates with MTAPD on fare enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's collaboration among management, union leadership, train crews and the MTAPD.

tool_args.label: LIRR and Metro-North establish joint fare evasion task force
tool_args.raw_text: The commuter railroads have been working collaboratively and have established a joint task force including representatives from the MTAPD to review the recommendations and to design plans for implementation.

payload.description: established a joint task force including representatives from the MTAPD to review the Blue-Ribbon Panel recommendations and design plans for implementation
